payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and simple molded border; surface has a low-gloss sheen with minor scuffs and wear, and the top and bottom are slightly cropped in the image; appears to be about 0.7 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and simple molded border; surface has a low-gloss sheen with minor scuffs and wear, and the top and bottom are slightly cropped in the image; appears to be about 0.7 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","recessed central panel","molded border trim","vertical orientation","tall and narrow","low-gloss finish","minor surface scuffs","slightly cropped top/bottom"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
